scripts.check: npm run pretauri && pushd src-tauri && cargo check
scripts.build: set NODE_ENV=production && npm run tauri:win build
scripts.build:assets: npm run version:sync && node minify.js && node lib-copy.js
scripts.dev: set NODE_ENV=development && npm run tauri:win dev
scripts.pretauri: npm run build:assets && npm run build:clean
scripts.tauri:win: (FOR /F "usebackq tokens=*" %i IN ("src-tauri/.env") DO @SET %i) && npm run tauri
